title: Use
effect: The abandoned spacecraft is weirdly empty of any bodies whatsoever. It’s as if everyone just disappeared. There are signs of a struggle, though with what isn’t clear, GM (group) Intrusion: Nearby light sources fail. Attacks and defenses against the zero- point phantoms are hindered by two steps for characters unable to see in the dark.
